meaning: n.肥皂泡,(马等)汗沫,<俚>焦躁不安,紧张,激动vt.涂以肥皂泡
examples: Soap does not lather well in hard water.
He wiped off the remains of the lather with a towel.
Clean skin means plenty of lather followed by a rinse with water.
But the issue has put those who are suspicious of big business in a lather.
No wonder Beth gets into a lather washing the dishes as she watches him.
